After $6.25 bn 'gift' to 'Trump Accounts', Michael & Susan Dell donate $750 m
description: Michael and Susan Dell have pledged $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This significant donation will focus on integrating AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education. The project, expected to open by 2030, aims to enhance Austin's healthcare capabilities and advance medical innovation.

title: Meta to install tracking software on American employee's machines: Here is what the memo said
description: Meta is installing new tracking software on US employees' computers to capture mouse movements, clicks, and keystrokes for AI training. This initiative aims to improve AI agents' ability to perform work tasks autonomously, like using shortcuts. Meta assures employees the data won't be used for performance reviews, only for enhancing AI models.

title: Lauren Kyle & Oilers Wives debut custom initial jackets for McDavid & Game 1
description: NHL Game 1 shifted the heads of other partners of the Edmonton Oilers, such as Lauren Kyle, when they attended the games in support of Connor McDavid and the team. The group were dressed in matching custom jackets with personalized initials, showing unity off the field. The visual was quick to spread over the internet and brought an additional layer of lifestyle and fan culture to the atmosphere of the playoffs in Edmonton.

title: Maya Angelou quote for kids: Do your best, then do better
description: Maya Angelou's wisdom, particularly her quote 'Do the best you can until you know better. Then when you know better, do better,' offers a powerful life lesson. It champions honesty, growth, and continuous improvement, acknowledging that mistakes are part of learning. This message provides hope and empowerment, especially for young people navigating life's complexities.
